payload.answer: Committed durable memory for Sam’s employer change and music listening preference; no conflicting prior facts provided.
citations: Daniele: Still at Goldman? Sam: No, I left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Daniele: Still listening to Bill Evans? Sam: Yes, but lately more early Coltrane.

entity_resolution.reason: No persistent entity disambiguation was requested or required beyond the named participants and organizations in the transcript.

memory_cards.statement: Sam said he left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Sam still listens to Bill Evans, and lately has been listening more to early Coltrane.

details: Avoided storing the catch-up/article exchange as durable memory because it appears transient.

repair_options: If later evidence contradicts Sam’s employer or music preference, update or supersede these cards rather than appending as current.
If the system prefers only highly stable facts, drop the music-preference card and retain only the employer-change fact.
